latest_external_review.score_note: paperreview.ai does not expose a calibrated numeric score for venue Other

current_revision_state.note: The current manuscript, paper/main_round31.pdf, implements the round30 external review requests with new detectability, misidentification, and standards-oriented analyses, but it has not yet been sent back out for external rereview.

round28_jpr_editorial_pass.note: See paper/main_round28.pdf and submission/JPR_20_PAPER_STYLE_MAP.md for the biology-first, JPR-facing revision made after the round27 external acceptance.

round29_abstract_rewrite.note: See paper/main_round29.pdf for the subsequent abstract rewrite based on JPR abstract patterns, with fewer metrics in the abstract and smoother biological framing.

round31_external_feedback_revision.note: See paper/main_round31.pdf, results/occupancy_detectability_model.csv, results/misidentification_sensitivity.csv, and results/canonicalization_examples.csv for the revision that directly implements the round30 external reviewer requests.

round21_submission_blocked.note: See review/round21_submission_blocked.md for the repeated submission attempts and the external-service error.

round26_submission_blocked.note: See review/round26_submission_blocked.md for the failed immediate retry and short-cooldown retry on the current manuscript.

round27_successful_rereview.note: See review/round27_review.md, review/round27_scorecard.json, and review/round27_paperreview_response.json for the successful acceptance review of paper/main_round26.pdf.

round30_successful_rereview.note: See review/round30_review.md, review/round30_scorecard.json, and review/round30_paperreview_response.json for the latest external review of paper/main_round29.pdf.

last_calibrated_internal_review.verdict: Accept for a reproducible re-analysis or data-note venue
